name: fn_add_numbers
description: Add two numbers together and return their sum.

name: fn_sub_numbers
description: Math subtraction (-) ONLY. Use when user asks for minus, difference, or subtract. Example: 10 - 5.

name: fn_reverse_string
description: Reverse a string and return the reversed result.

name: fn_greet
description: Greeting ONLY. Use ONLY for 'hello', 'hi'. NEVER use for math or strings.
